cues.label: First window full price
cues.headline: Sum the first k once
cues.narration: 4 plus 2 plus 7 is 13 — the only full addition we ever do.

cues.label: Slide one
cues.headline: Subtract 4, add 1
cues.narration: The 4 leaves, the 1 enters: 13 minus 4 plus 1 is 10.

cues.label: Overlap is free
cues.headline: The middle never moves
cues.narration: The 2 and 7 sit in both windows and are never re-added.

cues.label: Slide two
cues.headline: Subtract 2, add 9
cues.narration: 10 minus 2 plus 9 is 17 — a new best.

cues.label: Constant per step
cues.headline: Width does not matter
cues.narration: A width of 3 or 300 costs the same per slide: one out, one in.

cues.label: Linear total
cues.headline: One setup, then a sweep
cues.narration: One full sum plus a constant edit at each remaining position is O(n).
